description:
Pedantic clippy warns on lib.rs:72: docs for function returning Result missing # Errors section. Same issue pattern as avkc.12 in secretx-core.

Fix: add # Errors paragraph documenting which SecretError variants from_uri can return:
- InvalidUri: backend != local-signing, missing path, missing/unknown algorithm param
- NotFound: key file does not exist
- Backend: I/O error reading key file, PKCS#8 parse failure for the chosen algorithm

Same applies to other Result-returning items in this crate flagged by pedantic.
title: from_uri docstring missing # Errors section (clippy::missing_errors_doc)
